song.title: Lord, You Love Me So Immensely
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C G Lord You love me so immensely .Am Em I would love You more intensely .F C Everyday and every moment, .F G Oh Lord, capture me. .C G Let my goal and my life's theme be, .Am Em Lord, to love You most supremely .F C With all my heart Lord Jesus, .F G C Keep me faithful unto Thee.
[V2] .C G Draw me Lord each day .Am Em Take my veils away; .F C With a pure heart will I see You .F G Lord I just love You .C G Nothing else I seek, .Am Em No one else for me. .F C I would fully and absolutely .F G C Give my whole being unto Thee.
